tagline: Policy-driven runtime tool routing for LangChain and LangGraph agents.

features.title: Dynamic Tool Router for Agents
features.summary: Runtime tool selection, injection, permissions, fallback, audit logging, adapters, and a simple admin dashboard.

features.title: Persistent Policy and Audit Store
features.summary: File-backed policy configuration and audit persistence for durable tool governance evidence.

features.title: LangChain/LangGraph Real Integration Tests
features.summary: Optional real-framework compatibility tests or executable examples for LangChain and LangGraph tool injection.

features.title: Sellable Developer Preview
features.summary: Productize the Dynamic Tool Router as a sellable developer-preview package with buyer-facing README, demo flow, docs, security model, release notes, and SHIP-mode review gates.
